\noindent Calculation of the critical value

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup

\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
# Degrees of freedom
df = len(observed) - 1
# Critical value for alpha = 0.05
alpha = 0.05
critical_value = chi2.ppf(1 - alpha, df=df)
\end{Verbatim}
